pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: ECS/EKS services maintain desired task count. Health checks automatically replace unhealthy containers. Multi-AZ task placement.

pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: Task roles follow least-privilege. Container images scanned for vulnerabilities. Secrets injected via Secrets Manager or SSM.

pillars.title: Performance
pillars.description: Right-sized CPU and memory reservations. Auto-scaling based on custom metrics. Service discovery for low-latency communication.

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Fargate Spot for fault-tolerant workloads. Right-sized task definitions prevent over-provisioning. Shared ALB across services.
